name: bloating
title: best herbal teas for bloating
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra tea contains bioactive constituents such as glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and saponins that help to alleviate bloating. The anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties of this herbal tea help to soothe the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and ease cramping. To make this tea, combine 1 teaspoon of dried Glycyrrhiza glabra root with 1 cup of boiling water, let it steep for 5-7 minutes, and strain it before consumption.
